title: FlouState | Unlock Your True Coding Potential
industry: Developer tools — productivity analytics software (VS Code extension)

mark_criticality.evidence: FlouState is used as the primary SoftwareApplication brand name in schema markup and consistently across all marketing materials as the product's sole identifier.

similarity.evidence: 'FlouState' vs 'Flowstate' — a single 'ou'/'ow' character swap produces phonetically identical pronunciation ('flow-state'); near-identical visual appearance.

goods_services_overlap.evidence: Both products target software developers and could appear in overlapping channels (VS Code marketplace, developer communities); functions differ — time tracking vs. robotics automation environment.

geography_priority.evidence: Globally distributed VS Code extension available through Microsoft's marketplace, overlapping with Intrinsic's US-headquartered developer audience.

confusion_evidence.evidence: No evidence of actual consumer confusion or brand association between FlouState and Flowstate found on the page or in search results.

rights_posture.evidence: FlouState appears to be a newer indie product with no identified trademark registration; Intrinsic (Flowstate) appears to hold priority rights.

counterparty_profile.evidence: Founded by a solo developer ('Max'); operates a free tier plus $9.50/month Pro tier — modest commercial scale with limited resources.

enforcement_cost.evidence: Single indie developer operator; small-scale SaaS with paying subscribers but no apparent legal infrastructure; likely responsive to cease-and-desist.
